title: AICoderCodeStudyRequest

useGenerativeAI.description: Use or not generative AI for analysis

includeCodedResponses.description: Should coded responses be included into analysis

useEnhancedThemeExtractor.description:
Enable/disable using of enhanced theme extractor.
When the enhancedThemeExtractor is used, then the codebook options are ignored.

existingCodebookKey.description: Key of existing codebook. By default it creates a new codebook.

existingCodebookSuggestNewCodes.description: Should suggest new codes for existing codebook? It is false by default.

description: Contains parameters for study analyzing task
